body_errors.note: printed body reads Ἄλκιμον with grave accent at line break, not Ἄλκι- / μον as transcribed with acute on final syllable
final body word is split as συνέλαβεν across the page break; transcript omits the visible first part and instead continues with full word on next page context not shown

apparatus_errors.note: printed apparatus reads ἐνεπίστευσεν with accent

note: Mostly accurate, but there are a few clear body/accent issues and at least one definite apparatus omission.
